components.name: PostgreSQL Database
components.description: Stores users and URL references to audio and images stored on Cloudinary

components.name: Express Server
components.description: Fetches data from PostgreSQL database using Sequelize, serves React frontend, JWT token validation

components.name: Cloudinary
components.description: Stores audio and generates waveform visuals, stores images, sends back URLs

components.name: React Frontend
components.description: Redux for state management, actions upload images and audio to Cloudinary, app component controls playback of audio, sound component visualizes playback

connectors.label: Frontend makes Fetch calls to backend to store user and sound data
Frontend sends audio and image files
Cloudinary sends back URLs leading to files

components.name: Frontend
components.description: Includes components like App, Home, Profile, Dashboard, Sound, SoundBar, Upload, LoginForm, RegistrationForm, NavBar

annotations: This element (Backend) is already defined (Assumed diagram type: component)

unique_connectors_GroundTruth: Data flow from PostgreSQL Database to Express Server
Frontend makes Fetch calls to backend to store user and sound data
Frontend sends audio and image files to Cloudinary
Cloudinary sends back URLs leading to files
comparison.explanation: The GroundTruth diagram provides a detailed view of the Soundzone application architecture, including specific components like PostgreSQL Database, Express Server, Cloudinary, and React Frontend, along with their interactions. It highlights the data flow and interactions between these components. The GeneratedImage diagram focuses on a higher-level view, identifying packages like Frontend and Backend, and includes Redux as a specific component within the Frontend. However, it lacks specific connectors and detailed interactions. The GroundTruth diagram is more comprehensive, showing specific data flows and interactions, while the GeneratedImage diagram provides a structural overview without specific interactions. Rating: 6/10. The GeneratedImage diagram captures the basic structure but lacks the detailed interactions and components present in the GroundTruth diagram.
